layman_headline: Market fear is intense — patience beats chasing falling knives right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' territory and getting worse, with the fear index at 25 and trending down. Bitcoin is holding relatively steady around $64,500, but most altcoins are struggling badly. Bitcoin dominance at 56.5% means money is flowing away from smaller coins and into Bitcoin for safety. None of the swing trade candidates present a compelling risk-reward setup right now — charts are mostly bearish, and the few coins showing strength (like LDO) have already run up significantly.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market mood is too fearful and altcoin charts are too weak to justify opening a new position. Watch for Ethereum to test the $1,800 support level — if it bounces there with rising volume, that could be the entry signal.
expert_reasoning: No candidate currently meets the quality threshold for a new entry. BONK is in freefall with a -2.0 chart bias — catching that knife would be reckless despite oversold RSI. LDO has the best chart (+0.85 bias, Three White Soldiers) but RSI at 59 and a 51.7% 5-day surge means it's already extended. AERO and ONDO have slightly bullish charts but terrible risk/reward ratios (0.45x and 0.38x respectively). ETH is the strongest candidate on a watchlist basis — RSI at 39 is approaching the oversold zone where our signal credibility data shows 80% win rate, and the $1,800 support is a clean level to define risk. However, the overall bearish chart structure (-0.70 bias) and worsening Fear & Greed trend argue for waiting for a confirmed bounce rather than front-running support.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear trending worse (25 → worsening) could cascade into deeper selloff across all alts
Bitcoin weekend volatility risk with geopolitical oil tensions cited by CryptoSlate
BTC dominance at 56.5% actively punishing altcoin positions — could increase further
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with volume confirms entry, a break below invalidates
Fear & Greed index trajectory — need stabilization above 25 before deploying capital
BTC options expiry and Fed meeting timeline — massive call spreads targeting $72K could shift market sentiment
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) and deteriorating, with Bitcoin holding near $64,500 while altcoins bleed. High BTC dominance at 56.5% signals a risk-off environment where capital rotation favors Bitcoin over alternatives.
context_banner: Extreme Fear conditions demand patience — the best swing entries come after fear peaks, not while it's still intensifying.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25 and worsening trend warns against deploying capital into risk assets prematurely.
ETH RSI at 39 is approaching the oversold zone — our most reliable signal (80% win rate) — but hasn't triggered yet at sub-30.
Bitcoin facing dangerous weekend with 20% of world's oil supply at risk, adding geopolitical uncertainty to already fearful markets.
ETH derivatives reset reported, suggesting positioning is being cleaned out — could set up next directional move.
Massive BTC call spreads targeting $72,000 by month-end Fed meeting signal institutional bullish positioning that could lift the broader market.
